calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-13-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Joseph Pelochino, Esq. for Plaintiff Lumbermens Mutual Casualty Company and American Motorists Insurance Company.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiffs and against the defendant: Vital Link Business Systems, Inc. as follows:
Damages of $93,318.00
Prejudgment interest $8,410.00
Costs of $260.00
For the total of $101,988.00
Counsel to prepare Judgment.

May 13, 2004 at 2:00 p.m.
Judgment received in court and signed by Comm. Kaplan.
